subcodes.first_line: Verily, the ungodly sought to extinguish the Light of God with their hosts, and arose to quench the fire of My Lote-Tree. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المشرکین ارادوا ان یطفوا نور الله بجنودهم و قاموا علی اخماد نار سدرتی قل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
